source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select l.LeadID as lp_lead_id,TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(concat(c.FirstName,' ',c.LastName),',',''),'"','')) as lead_name,
TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(
    SUBSTRING(c.Address1, 1, 
        CASE 
            WHEN PATINDEX('%[a-zA-Z]%', c.Address1) = 0 THEN NULL

            WHEN CHARINDEX(', ' + NULLIF(TRIM(c.City), ''), c.Address1) > 0 
                 THEN CHARINDEX(', ' + NULLIF(TRIM(c.City), ''), c.Address1) - 1

            WHEN CHARINDEX(' ' + NULLIF(TRIM(c.City), '') + ' ', c.Address1 + ' ') > 0 
                 THEN CHARINDEX(' ' + NULLIF(TRIM(c.City), '') + ' ', c.Address1 + ' ') - 1

            WHEN CHARINDEX(' ' + NULLIF(TRIM(c.State), '') + ' ', c.Address1 + ' ') > 0 
                 THEN CHARINDEX(' ' + NULLIF(TRIM(c.State), '') + ' ', c.Address1 + ' ') - 1

            WHEN CHARINDEX(' ' + NULLIF(TRIM(c.Zip), '') + ' ', c.Address1 + ' ') > 0 
                 THEN CHARINDEX(' ' + NULLIF(TRIM(c.Zip), '') + ' ', c.Address1 + ' ') - 1

            ELSE LEN(c.Address1)
        END
    ), ',', ''), '"', ''))
 AS lead_address,TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(c.City,',',''),'"','')) as lead_city,TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(c.State,',',''),'"','')) as lead_state,
    TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(c.Zip,',',''),'"','')) as lead_zip,TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(c.Email,',',''),'"','')) as lead_email,
    TRIM(REPLACE(TRANSLATE(c.Phone, '+-(). ', '      '), ' ', '')) AS lead_phone
    from EDW.FACT_LEAD l inner join EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER c on l.CustomerID=c.CustomerID
    where CAST(l.EntryDate as DATE)=CAST(DATEADD(dd,-1,GETDATE()) AS DATE)
